summaryPoints: 24 of 100 conversations are scored as bad quality.
Top intent is product_discovery with 39 conversations.
20 recommendation conversations led to user follow-through events.

recommendations.title: Compliance Risk: Missing Safety Framing
recommendations.description: 38 conversations include risk-sensitive claims without disclaimers.
rootCauses: Inadequate training data for safety framing, leading to inconsistent language injection
Insufficient intent identification algorithms, causing delayed isolation of risk-sensitive contexts
Lack of real-time claim moderation checks, resulting in undetected safety risks
suggestedActions: Develop and integrate AI-driven safety framing templates, adaptable to various risk-sensitive contexts
Implement a multi-step intent identification process, incorporating both keyword-based and semantic analysis
Establish a hybrid moderation approach, combining automated checks with human review for high-risk conversations
recommendations.hypothesis: Automated safety framing will materially reduce compliance exposure.

recommendations.title: Low Recommendation Follow-Through
recommendations.description: Recommendation conversion is 7.8% for this widget.
rootCauses: Insufficient contextual understanding leading to mismatched recommendations
Lack of transparency in the recommendation algorithm eroding user trust
Inadequate feedback mechanisms to refine and improve recommendation accuracy
suggestedActions: Implement intent-based recommendation filtering with contextual cues
Develop and display clear, concise explanations for each recommended item
Conduct A/B testing on CTA formats and recommendation layouts to optimize user engagement
recommendations.hypothesis: Higher recommendation precision and clearer CTAs will improve conversion.

recommendations.title: Inefficient User Information Collection
recommendations.description: Users are frequently not providing required information, leading to unresolved issues and increased conversation time.
rootCauses: did_not_provide_required_info
repeatedly_asked_about_order_status
suggestedActions: Improve user prompts for required information
Enhance conversation flow to handle missing user input
recommendations.whyNew: This issue is not covered by existing insights and is supported by metrics such as did_not_provide_required_info and unresolved_rate.

recommendations.title: Inconsistent Health Claim Disclaimer
recommendations.description: The assistant failed to provide a disclaimer for health claims in 10 instances, which may lead to regulatory issues and damage to the brand's reputation.
rootCauses: Lack of training data
Inadequate content review
suggestedActions: Review and update training data

recommendations.whyNew: This issue is new because it highlights a specific problem with the assistant's handling of health claims, which is not covered by existing insights.

recommendations.title: Unresolved User Needs
